For { get; set; }\n    /// <inheritdoc />\n    void IComponent.Attach(RenderHandle renderHandle)\n    {\n        _renderHandle = renderHandle;\n    }\n\n    /// <inheritdoc />\n    Task IComponent.SetParametersAsync(ParameterView parameters)\n    {\n        parameters.SetParameterProperties(this);\n\n        var newDisplayName = ExpressionMemberAccessor.GetDisplayName(For);\n        _displayName = newDisplayName;\n        _renderHandle.Render(BuildRenderTree);\n\n        return Task.CompletedTask;\n    }\n\n    private void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)\n    {\n        builder.AddContent(0, _displayName);\n    }\n}\n","numLines":51,"startLine":1,"totalLines":51}}}

Licensed to the .NET Foundation under one or more agreements.\n// The .NET Foundation licenses this file to you under the MIT license.\n\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\nusing System.ComponentModel;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\nusing System.Linq.Expressions;\nusing System.Reflection;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.HotReload;\n\nnamespace Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms;\n\ninternal static class ExpressionMemberAccessor\n{\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<Expression, MemberInfo> _memberInfoCache = new();\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<MemberInfo, string> _displayNameCache = new();\n\n    static ExpressionMemberAccessor()\n    {\n        if (HotReloadManager.Default.MetadataUpdateSupported)\n        {\n            HotReloadManager.Default.OnDeltaApplied += ClearCache;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static MemberInfo GetMemberInfo<TValue>(Expression<Func<TValue>> accessor)\n    {\n        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(accessor);\n\n        return _memberInfoCache.GetOrAdd(accessor, static expr =>\n        {\n            var lambdaExpression = (LambdaExpression)expr;\n            var accessorBody = lambdaExpression.Body;\n\n            if (accessorBody is UnaryExpression unaryExpression\n                && unaryExpression.NodeType == ExpressionType.Convert\n                && unaryExpression.Type == typeof(object))\n            {\n                accessorBody = unaryExpression.Operand;\n            }\n\n            if (accessorBody is not MemberExpression memberExpression)\n            {\n                throw new ArgumentException(\n                    $\"The provided expression contains a {accessorBody.GetType().Name} which is not supported. \" +\n                    $\"Only simple member accessors (fields, properties) of an object are supported.\");\n            }\n\n            return memberExpression.Member;\n        });\n    }\n\n    public static string GetDisplayName(MemberInfo member)\n    {\n        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(member);\n\n        return _displayNameCache.GetOrAdd(member, static m =>\n        {\n            var displayNameAttribute = m.GetCustomAttribute<DisplayNameAttribute>();\n            if (displayNameAttribute?.DisplayName is not null)\n            {\n                return displayNameAttribute.DisplayName;\n            }\n\n            var displayAttribute = m.GetCustomAttribute<DisplayAttribute>();\n            if (displayAttribute is not null)\n            {\n                var name = displayAttribute.GetName();\n                if (name is not null)\n                {\n                    return name;\n                }\n            }\n\n            return m.Name;\n        });\n    }\n\n    public static string GetDisplayName<TValue>(Expression<Func<TValue>> accessor)\n    {\n        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(accessor);\n        var member = GetMemberInfo(accessor);\n        return GetDisplayName(member);\n    }\n\n    private static void ClearCache()\n    {\n        _memberInfoCache.Clear();\n    }\n}\n","numLines":91,"startLine":1,"totalLines":91}}}

Let me analyze:\n\n## What the diff shows:\n\n### DisplayName.cs changes:\n**REMOVED** (the original, correct code):\n```csharp\nif (For is null)\n{\n    throw new InvalidOperationException($\"{GetType()} requires a value for the \" +\n        $\"{nameof(For)} parameter.\");\n}\n\n// Only recalculate if the expression changed\nif (For != _previousFieldAccessor)\n{\n    var newDisplayName = ExpressionMemberAccessor.GetDisplayName(For);\n\n    if (newDisplayName != _displayName)\n    {\n        _displayName = newDisplayName;\n        _renderHandle.Render(BuildRenderTree);\n    }\n\n    _previousFieldAccessor = For;\n}\n```\n\n**ADDED** (the buggy code - what's currently in the file):\n```csharp\nvar newDisplayName = ExpressionMemberAccessor.GetDisplayName(For);\n_displayName = newDisplayName;\n_renderHandle.Render(BuildRenderTree);\n```\n\nSo the defects are:\n1. **Removed null check for For** - Line 39: Will crash if For is null\n2. **Removed render optimization** - Line 39-44: Always renders even if expression/name didn't change, and doesn't track previous accessor\n3. **Removed display name comparison** - Only re-renders if the name actually changed (not just if expression changed)\n\n### ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs changes:\n**CHANGED** - The order of attribute checking was swapped:\n\n**REMOVED** (original order):\n- First check DisplayAttribute\n- Then check DisplayNameAttribute\n\n**ADDED** (current order):\n```csharp\nvar displayNameAttribute = m.GetCustomAttribute<DisplayNameAttribute>();\n\n\nif (displayNameAttribute?.DisplayName is not null)\n{\n    return displayNameAttribute.DisplayName;\n}\n\nvar displayAttribute = m.GetCustomAttribute<DisplayAttribute>();\n```\n\nThe attribute precedence got flipped - DisplayNameAttribute now takes priority when it should be DisplayAttribute first per the documentation. Additionally, `_displayNameCache.Clear();` was removed from ClearCache(), leaving the cache incomplete.\n\nThere are **5 defects** total: missing null validation that would cause crashes, eliminated render optimization logic that prevents unnecessary updates, inverted attribute checking order, and incomplete cache clearing.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8737,"cache_read_input_tokens":23804,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":8737},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4b09607a-a685-4f73-b995-db5db4236485","uuid":"fc5e10ac-42e8-48f9-a355-9700c399258e"}

If not provided \n         by the parent component, it will be null at runtime, causing \n         ArgumentNullException when passed to GetDisplayName().\n  Impact: Component will crash if For parameter is not provided\n  Fix: Add null check with InvalidOperationException before calling GetDisplayName()\n\n[HIGH] Line 35 - Missing render optimization\n  Issue: The component always calls Render() on every parameter update, even when \n         the For expression hasn't changed. The _previousFieldAccessor field is \n         initialized but never used, indicating incomplete implementation.\n  Impact: Unnecessary re-renders cause performance degradation and violate Blazor \n          component conventions\n  Fix: Track previous accessor expression and only re-render when it changes\n\n[HIGH] Line 40 - Missing display name comparison check\n  Issue: The component re-renders whenever parameters change, even if the resolved \n         display name value hasn't actually changed (only the expression reference).\n  Impact: Generates extra render calls even when output is identical\n  Fix: Check if the display name value changed before calling Render()\n\n\nFILE: src/Components/Web/src/Forms/ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs\n---------------------------------------------------------------\n\n[MEDIUM] Line 59 - Incorrect attribute precedence\n  Issue: DisplayNameAttribute is checked before DisplayAttribute, but the \n         documentation lists DisplayAttribute first, indicating it should have \n         priority.\n  Impact: When both attributes are present, DisplayAttribute will be ignored \n          in favor of DisplayNameAttribute\n  Fix: Reverse the order of checks - evaluate DisplayAttribute first\n\n[CRITICAL] Line 86 - Incomplete cache invalidation on hot reload\n  Issue: The ClearCache() method only clears _memberInfoCache but not \n         _displayNameCache. When hot reload applies attribute changes, stale \n         cached display names persist.\n  Impact: Hot reload will not work correctly for display name attribute changes; \n          old values will continue to be returned\n  Fix: Clear both _memberInfoCache and _displayNameCache in ClearCache()\n\n\nSEVERITY BREAKDOWN\n==================\nCritical:  2 (defects 1, 5)\nHigh:      2 (defects 2, 3)\nMedium:    1 (defect 4)\n\nRECOMMENDATIONS\n===============\nAll five defects should be addressed.
